title: セントライト記念の後に・昇竜と伏龍

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's passed the finish line! Kitasan Black has
conquered the distance and proved that running
2,200 meters is no obstacle to her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I-I did it! I kept up a solid pace all the way to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I might not have anything to set me apart, but I
was still able to stay in the front and run to the
very end! This...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is how I run! This is how I live! This is the only
path I can take, but it's all mine!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'm not a prodigy or elite runner.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is throw myself wholeheartedly into
my training and keep my nose to the grindstone.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I'll prove my worth. I'll make it to the stage
where only genuinely strong Umamusume can
stand—just by working slowly and steadily!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black, huh? She doesn't have any cool
and flashy moves, and she's always on the brink
of being overtaken, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
The way she puts 110% into whatever she does is
pretty impressive, huh? Especially today...

You're perfectly right. Kita always tries her
absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, aren't you...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Satono Diamond?! I-is that really you?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita will only get stronger from here. So please...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please continue to cheer for her. She is a
wonderful Umamusume who truly deserves it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia! You came to watch me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I did. You were superb on the track. Thank you
for such a wonderful showing. I also have
something to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It seems my debut is finally at hand, and I'll soon
be entering the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I may not be anywhere near your level yet,
but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I swear I will catch up with you, so you have to do
your very best at the Kikuka Sho, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I can't wait to race with you one day,
especially since we still have our promise to keep!
But, before we race each other...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There's someone I have to beat... There's an
Umamusume I have to settle the score with first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A towering gate, the pinnacle of her
generation—Brusquement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black will never be able to move on to
the next stage if she doesn't beat her at the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black! Trainer! This is bad! Quick, turn on
the news!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The news?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We turn on the TV, and the first thing we see is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement's trainer surrounded by a throng of
reporters.

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yes, surgery. Something was amiss after the
Derby, and we are continuing to discuss the best
course of action moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text:
However, Brusquement will not be running in the
Kikuka Sho. She will focus on recovery for the
time being.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait... She's pulling out of the race?! Now what,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My brain is firing on all cylinders. If her most
powerful rival is out of the picture, then we'll
need to rework our strategy from square one.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Will she be okay? Even if she will be, she won't be
in the Kikuka Sho anymore...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I had finally prepared myself emotionally to give
that race everything I had too...
choice_data_list: Let's just calm down for now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! Sorry about that. This is all just so
sudden...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I have to get ahold of myself and switch gears. I
don't think I can do it right away, so I'll just take
it slow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series is no cakewalk. The moment
you clear one hurdle, another one pops up to
take its place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to help Kitasan Black so she'll be able to
run well in the Kikuka Sho, even without her
biggest rival there to drive her forward.
